case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS MAYBAUER, JOHN D.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,906.23 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MAYBAUER, JOHN D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-25-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MAYBAUER, JOHN D.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAYBAUER, JOHN D. $1,906.23 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,932.23 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PLAINTIFF REQUEST TO VACATE & DISMISS THE CASE. SENT TO JUDGE TO SIGN.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR HEARING SET FOR JUL-08-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUL-08-2003, GRANTED
COURT ORDERED DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT MAYBAUER, JOHN D.
